description.overview: The Puli is a small Hungarian herding dog with a distinctive corded coat, often described as a 'mop on springs.'
description.temperament: Pulik are intelligent, energetic, and playful. They're quick learners but can be independent.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to hip dysplasia and eye problems.
description.exercise: High energy. Need daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Energetic Hungarian herders with iconic corded coats. Pulik are intelligent and playful but require dedicated coat maintenance.
